Updated 12/01/2002

Registration for the First Annual Alpha Project Research Symposium
Registration is free. However, seating is limited and registration is encouraged.
 
Two Ways to Register
Email your name and contact information to Ms. Dawn Warfield
dwarfield@molsci.org
-OR-
Call 510-981-8743
